title: PR-context file frontmatter (`.vinta-ai-workflows/prs-context/<feature>/<phase>.md`)
description: YAML frontmatter at the top of every `.vinta-ai-workflows/prs-context/{feature-kebab}/phase-{phase.id}.md` file. Authored by `implement-plan` (and rewritten by `amend-plan`); read + updated by the bundled `open-pr.sh` script. The `# Title`, `# Description`, `# Comments` body sections that follow the frontmatter are markdown / fenced YAML and not covered by this schema; the `# Comments` YAML list has its own schema (`prs-context-comments.v1.schema.json`).

schema_version.description: Schema major version. Bumped only on breaking changes.

plan_id.description: Kebab-case identifier of the plan. Filename feature portion (strip `YYYY-MM-DD-` prefix and `_PLAN.md` suffix, lowercase).

feature_name.description: `UPPERCASE_WITH_UNDERSCORES` feature name. Matches the plan + spec filename feature portion.

phase_id.description: Phase id verbatim from the plan §5 (e.g. `1`, `4a`, `2.5`).

phase_title.description: Phase title verbatim from the plan §5.

branch.description: Source branch the PR opens from. Default convention `plan/<plan-id-kebab>/phase-<phase.id>`.

base.description: Target branch. Either the project's default branch (`main`) or the previous phase's stacked branch.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the PR-context file was first written.

pr_url.description: URL of the published PR / MR. Populated by `open-pr.sh` on success. Empty string while `status: pending`.
